title: Crispy Citrus Kale Stir Fry
description: A citrusy, crisp Ethiopian-inspired dish featuring Chinese cabbage with a touch of sweetness and a crunchy texture that is both cozy and satisfying.

ingredients.name: Fresh citrus zest (lemon, orange)
ingredients.notes: Citrus provides acidity and flavor without added sugars

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: No added sugar, but salt can enhance flavors

instructions: Trim the Chinese cabbage leaves and cut into strips.
In a large bowl, mix together the shredded cabbage, minced garlic, and freshly grated citrus zest. Add salt to taste.
Heat oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat until shimmering hot.
Add the cabbage mixture to the heated pan and stir-fry for about 5 minutes until slightly wilted but still crisp.
Toss with sesame seeds (if using) and chili flakes, if desired. Serve immediately.
